scripts.build: mkdir -p www/fonts && cp index.html style.css icons.js game-logic.js game.js manifest.json service-worker.js apple-touch-icon.png icon.png icon-192.png icon-512.png privacy.html www/ 2>/dev/null; cp fonts/*.woff2 fonts/*.ttf www/fonts/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init BlockRoyale com.blockroyale.app --web-dir www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:open:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
